Hey Producthunt 🤙 [...] For promotional purposes, it is sophisticated, and when I prompt better, the result would be more than perfect for me.

Good job! 👌

Pranay Bansal

Congratulations on the launch!

I wanna ask, how robust is the AI in understanding the complex brand guidelines? There are many "thumb rules" like logo placement rules, or advanced typography, etc. And how much flexibility does a user have in editing a generated item without spending credits?

Kunal Shah
Polygon Video

Polygon Video

@pranay12 We have support for custom brand guideline rules and typography coming soon!

Erliza. P
Hirbod Bigvand 
Surfboard

Surfboard

This is so cool! Can’t wait to get my hands dirty with this and create some cool ads. Love the fact you can upload and save brand assets so it’s always on point. Well done! [...] The Dazzle Team 🫡

Alsafa Alizada

@kunalsh23 Congratulations, Kunal, on building such an impressive product! I’d love for you to take a look at what I created using outputs from our app, Maqnet.ai — on Dazzle. I believe there’s strong potential for us to merge our strengths, possibly through an API or SDK integration, to create something even more powerful.

Hamza Afzal Butt

@kunalsh23 Really sleek concept. Congrats on the launch :)  
  
I just tried it with logo do not know what I want to create but it's somehow good (logo placement is not right) but its try to show something 😂
